title: AI Analysis
helpText: How can I help with your plants today?
helpSubtext: I can analyze plant photos, diagnose issues, suggest nutrient schedules, or answer cultivation questions.
dataUseNotice: Messages and relevant context may be stored in your account, and AI requests may be sent to external providers to generate answers.
freeTasteHelp: Upload one plant photo and get a focused read on what looks healthy, what might be off, and the next thing to check.
freeTasteNote: The free experience is image-based, limited, and does not keep chat history. Premium unlocks deeper follow-ups and saved conversations.
freeTasteUploadDesc: Upload a fresh plant photo to get a quick analysis and next step.
freeTasteImageRequired: Upload at least one plant photo to use the free AI preview.
freeTasteLimitReached: You already used today's free AI preview. Try again tomorrow or upgrade for full access.
freeTasteFooter: Preview responses can be wrong. Use them as a starting point and verify before acting.
diagnosePrompt: My plant leaves are turning yellow. What could be wrong?
feedingPrompt: Create a feeding schedule for week 4 of flowering
plantPhotoPrompt: Here is a photo of my plants. How do they look? Are they ready to harvest?
disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Verify important information.
authError: Authentication failed. Please try signing in again.
premiumError: Premium subscription required for AI assistant.
rateLimitError: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
signInRequired: Please sign in to use the AI assistant
noPhotosAvailable: No photos available for your plants.
plantSelectionContext: Here is a photo of {{plantName}}. {{wateringContext}} How does it look? Does it need anything specific based on this?
